title: Change to use_case field in VPC endpoint API responses
body:
In an upcoming release, the `use_case` field in the VPC endpoint CRUD response JSON will change from `WORKSPACE_ACCESS` to `GENERAL_ACCESS`. This change should not impact most customers.

See the [VPC Endpoints API](https://docs.databricks.com/api/account/vpcendpoints) and [Manage VPC endpoint registrations](/aws/en/security/network/classic/vpc-endpoints).
